svg.text: Qt powers top-tier industrial software: KDE, VirtualBox, OBS Studio, Autodesk Maya,
Telegram Desktop and the in-car infotainment of countless automobiles are all built on
Qt potenzia software industriale di prima fascia: KDE, VirtualBox, OBS Studio,
Autodesk Maya, Telegram Desktop e l'infotainment di moltissime auto sono basati su Qt.
